creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
-- hello.c --
#include <stdio.h>

int
main(int argc, char *argv[])
{
        puts("hi!");
}
--

root@:~ # clang --version
FreeBSD clang version 3.6.0 (tags/RELEASE_360/final 230434) 20150225
Target: aarch64-unknown-freebsd11.0
Thread model: posix
